# DM Scripts

## Tone Rules

- Calm, direct, and non-judgmental
- No legal conclusions
- Focus on safety, timeline, and evidence gathering

## Tier Red First Contact

Template:

Hi [Name], thank you for reaching out. We can help you organize this quickly so you are not carrying it alone. First priority is safety and immediate deadlines. We are not your law firm, but we can prepare a structured case packet for attorney review fast. If you are in immediate danger, call local emergency services now.

Can you send these 5 items right now:
1. What happened today and what deadline is next.
2. Names/roles of people involved.
3. Any orders/notices/messages you have.
4. What children need immediately (if applicable).
5. Best callback number and state/county.

## Truancy/Criminal Parent Liability

Template:

Hi [Name], understood. We can help build a clean compliance narrative before court. Please send school notices, attendance records, and any actions you took (meetings, discipline steps, transport, communications). We will convert this into a timeline and evidence packet for counsel review.

## Eviction/Housing Crisis

Template:

Hi [Name], we can help structure this quickly. Please send lease, payment proof, notices, and photos/messages about conditions or lockout attempts. We will build a timeline and evidence index so counsel can assess defenses and damages.

## Protection Order Property Access

Template:

Hi [Name], understood. We can help organize an emergency property-access request packet. Please list essential child items needed in the next 24 hours, provide any order documents, and note police interactions with date/time.

## Escalation Close

Template:

Thank you. We have enough to build your packet now. You will receive: case summary, timeline, evidence index, missing-doc checklist, and attorney questions list. Red-tier matters are routed for qualified legal review.
